user_request: ubah sequence diagram jadi sesuai activity. Hanya perlu user (client/manager/teknisi), terus system, terus database. Drop "M M" pattern (Browser-T/Browser-M split). User left, system middle, right side either user or database — ngikut activity. User confirmed: align to 4 SD (drop REVIEW_GATE + ESKALASI, add UPLOAD_EVIDENCE). Dual-actor rule: User1|Sistem|DB|User2.

content:
Plan approved. Single specialist needed: Nakamura (Python tooling rewrite + file ops).

## Approved decisions
- Final SD count: 4 (align to activity count)
- Drop: SD_REVIEW_GATE.drawio, SD_ESKALASI.drawio
- Keep + restructure: SD_AUTENTIKASI, SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK, SD_DASHBOARD_EWS
- Add new: SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE
- Lifeline rule single-actor: `User (Role) | Sistem | Database` (3 lifelines)
- Lifeline rule dual-actor (future): `User1 | Sistem | Database | User2` (4 lifelines)

## Final SD mapping
| File | Lifelines | Activity | Caption |
|------|-----------|----------|---------|
| SD_AUTENTIKASI | User \| Sistem \| Database | AD_LOGIN | Gambar 4.10 |
| SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK | User (Manager) \| Sistem \| Database | AD_BUAT_PROYEK | Gambar 4.11 |
| SD_DASHBOARD_EWS | User (Manager) \| Sistem \| Database | AD_KELOLA_DASHBOARD | Gambar 4.12 |
| SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE | User (Teknisi) \| Sistem \| Database | AD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE | Gambar 4.13 |

## Specialist plan
Nakamura solo — 5 sub-tasks all in his lane (Python rewrite, file delete, doc update):
1. Rewrite _gen.py spec functions (5 → 4, simplified lifelines, page width 1400 → ~700)
2. Run python _gen.py → emit 4 .drawio files
3. Delete obsolete SD_REVIEW_GATE.drawio + SD_ESKALASI.drawio
4. Update STANDARD.md Sequence section (lifeline rule)
5. Update TODO.md (5 → 4 SD, captions 4.10–4.13)

Plan file: C:\Users\GNERyze\.claude\plans\floofy-crunching-avalanche.md

No parallel needed (all sequential, single contributor scope).

note: rewriting _gen.py: 3 lifeline layout, 4 diagrams, new SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE

content:
## Result

All 6 acceptance criteria met.

### Files changed
- `diagram/ai/Sequence/_gen.py` — full rewrite. 5 SD specs → 4. All lifelines collapsed to 3-column `User|Sistem|Database`. Page width 700. New `sd4_upload_evidence()` added.
- `diagram/STANDARD.md` — inserted "Lifeline rule (mirror activity layout)" subsection after lifeline header table (~line 142).
- `diagram/TODO.md` — SD count 5→4, captions 4.10-4.13, SD_REVIEW_GATE→SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE, SD_ESKALASI dropped, all checklist items marked done, lifeline tables updated.

### Generated (4 files, all XML-parseable)
- SD_AUTENTIKASI.drawio — 9262 bytes, Gambar 4.10
- SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK.drawio — 13035 bytes, Gambar 4.11
- SD_DASHBOARD_EWS.drawio — 11765 bytes, Gambar 4.12
- SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE.drawio — 8547 bytes, Gambar 4.13

### Deleted (2 files)
- SD_REVIEW_GATE.drawio
- SD_ESKALASI.drawio

### Verification
- XML parse: all 4 clean
- Grep Browser-T|Browser-M|API Backend (Express): 0 matches
- ls shows exactly 4 SD_*.drawio + _gen.py

### SD4 flow design note
No AD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE narrative in naskah/09_activity_diagram.md (that doc covers 5 old ADs). Flow derived from plan spec + existing task/evidence API patterns in _gen.py:
- GET /api/tasks/:id → render task detail
- POST /api/tasks/:id/evidence (multer multipart)
- PATCH tb_task status to working_on_it if was to_do
- alt fragment: valid file / invalid file (type/size check)
Tables: tb_task, tb_task_evidence

User feedback round 2: "harusnya itu lurus sequencenya, ga yg ada sub container kotak gitu, tolong cari diagram sequence yang sesuai akademis! bikin 3-7 life line sesuai activity aja! jangan nambah nambahin semau kamu!"

Then "uml" (typo'd "umr").

## Decisions confirmed
- **Style**: UML academic (linear, no combined fragments) — matches thesis author's own p50-p54
- **Lifeline count**: 3 per diagram (User|Sistem|Database) — user picked "Activity actors + Database always"
- **Fragments**: REMOVE ALL alt/loop/opt/par — user picked "Hapus semua, sequence lurus aja (happy path)"

## Naomi research findings
Source: thesis pages 50-54 + Indonesian academic refs (Dicoding, ITBox, Telkom Univ).
- Indonesian TA convention: linear flow, no fragments
- 3 lifelines typical (User|Sistem|Database)
- Header style: rectangles only (no actor stick figure in p50-54). KEEPING umlActor stick for User per current STANDARD — will note as discrepancy if user objects.

## Execution plan
Single Nakamura spawn:
1. Rewrite _gen.py spec functions: drop ALL `frag_begin/split/end` calls, convert conditional branches to linear happy-path
2. Regenerate 4 .drawio
3. Update STANDARD.md: note "academic style: omit combined fragments, prefer linear happy-path"
4. Verify grep: `alt \[|loop \[|opt \[|par \[` returns 0 matches

note: rewriting _gen.py: remove all fragments, linear happy-path only

content:
## Changes made

### _gen.py
- Removed `frag_begin()`, `frag_split()`, `frag_end()` methods entirely from SeqBuilder class
- Removed `fragment_cells()` primitive function
- Removed `frag_stack` state from `__init__`
- Rewrote all 4 spec functions as linear happy-path only:
  - sd1_autentikasi: dropped alt[valid/invalid], kept login happy path only (9 messages)
  - sd2_pengelolaan_proyek: dropped loop[setiap task], loop[setiap assignment], opt[notifikasi async] — kept single representative INSERT calls (20 messages)
  - sd3_dashboard_ews: dropped par[fetch chart data paralel] + loop[TanStack polling] — linearised 3 DB fetch calls sequentially (12 messages)
  - sd4_upload_evidence: dropped alt[file valid/invalid] — kept upload success path (11 messages)

### STANDARD.md
- Replaced Combined Fragment section (4 style lines) with academic-style OMIT notice + reference to p50-p54 thesis convention

## Verification

- Dir listing: 4 SD_*.drawio + _gen.py confirmed

section_title: Iteration 3 — Multi-lifeline MVC, no stick figure
content:
User feedback round 3: lifeline harusnya >3, no actor stick-figure, format "User (Role)".

## Naomi research (evidence-based)
- Indonesian academic dominant pattern: 4-5 lifelines (MVC: Boundary/Controller/Entity)
- Stick figure is convention but RECTANGLE is UML-compliant (per UML 2 spec + ResearchGate ref)
- User explicitly rejects stick figure → all rectangles

## Per-SD spec (Naomi recommendation)
- SD_AUTENTIKASI (4 lifelines): User (Pengguna) | Halaman Login | AuthController | Database
- SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK (5 lifelines): User (Manajer) | Halaman Proyek | ProjectController | ProjectService | Database
- SD_DASHBOARD_EWS (5 lifelines): User (Manajer) | Halaman Dashboard | DashboardController | ProjectHealthService | Database
- SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE (5 lifelines): User (Teknisi) | Halaman Task | EvidenceController | FileStorage | Database

## Execution
Single Nakamura spawn:
1. Rewrite _gen.py: change actor type from "actor" stick-figure → all "object" rectangles
2. Expand lifelines per spec above (4-5 per SD)
3. Adjust messages to match MVC layers (Halaman → Controller → Service → DB)
4. Page width up to ~1100 (5 lifelines need more horizontal space)
5. Update STANDARD.md: rectangle-for-all rule + 4-5 lifeline academic pattern

note: Iteration 3: rewrite _gen.py - 5-lifeline MVC, all rectangles, no umlActor

content:
## Iteration 3 — All-rectangle MVC lifelines

### Changes made
- `_gen.py`: Removed `actor_cell()` + `umlActor` branch entirely. All lifelines call `object_cell()`.
- `SeqBuilder`: lifelines list changed from `(id, name, type)` to `(id, name)` — type param gone.
- Page widths: 700 -> 1100 (4-lifeline), 700 -> 1300 (5-lifeline).
- 4 spec functions rewritten with new lifeline lists + linear MVC message flows.
- `diagram/STANDARD.md`: Lifeline header section replaced with "all rectangles" rule. Lifeline rule section updated to MVC 4/5 pattern.

### Verification results
- umlActor grep: 0 matches across all 4 .drawio files
- XML parse: all 4 OK
- Lifeline counts:
  - SD_AUTENTIKASI: 4 [User (Pengguna) | Halaman Login | AuthController | Database]
  - SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK: 5 [User (Manajer) | Halaman Proyek | ProjectController | ProjectService | Database]
  - SD_DASHBOARD_EWS: 5 [User (Manajer) | Halaman Dashboard | DashboardController | ProjectHealthService | Database]
  - SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE: 5 [User (Teknisi) | Halaman Task | EvidenceController | FileStorage | Database]
- File sizes: 6882 / 12064 / 10380 / 10245 bytes
- Naskah refs intact: Gambar 4.10-4.13 captions present in each file

### Status: COMPLETE — all acceptance criteria met

User feedback round 4:
- Format (4-5 lifeline rectangle MVC) sudah OK
- Konten/text salah → terlalu teknis (GET /api, SELECT, INSERT, BEGIN TRANSACTION)
- Need: akademik teori, "lebih main ke kata kata"
- Source: `naskah/` (specifically activity narratives in 09_activity_diagram.md)
- Action: delete all + rebuild

## Translation guideline (technical → academic)
- `GET /api/clients` → `minta daftar klien`
- `SELECT id, name FROM tb_client` → `ambil data klien`
- `POST /api/projects {payload}` → `kirim data proyek`
- `INSERT INTO tb_project` → `simpan data proyek`
- `BEGIN TRANSACTION / COMMIT` → drop entirely
- `200 OK { clients }` → `tampilkan daftar klien`
- `bcrypt.compare(...)` → `verifikasi kata sandi`
- `JOIN ... WHERE ...` → drop SQL details, keep narrative

## Routing
1. Naomi: re-read naskah/09_activity_diagram.md, extract activity flow per AD in academic Indonesian (kata-kata, no code/SQL)
2. Nakamura: delete 4 .drawio + rewrite _gen.py messages with academic wording + regenerate

note: Iteration 4: delete all .drawio, rebuild with academic Indonesian messages from naskah narrative

content:

- SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK.drawio: 9145 bytes (13 messages, 5 lifelines)

### Verifications
- [x] 4 .drawio files present in dir
- [x] grep technical strings (GET /api, POST /api, SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, tb_*, bcrypt, etc) -> 0 matches
- [x] XML parse all 4 -> OK

### Message vocabulary used
Academic Indonesian verbs: membuka, memasukkan, meneruskan, meminta, mengembalikan, memverifikasi, memeriksa, mengirim, mengarahkan, mengisi, menetapkan, mengirimkan, memvalidasi, menyimpan, mendistribusikan, menghitung, menampilkan, mengambil, mencatat, memperbarui, mengonfirmasi, mengurutkan

No SQL/HTTP/code strings anywhere in .drawio output.

section_title: Iteration 5 — Strict activity mirror + DB only
content:
User clarification: "tapi kalo menurut kamu perlu ada lifeline tambahan kayak database ato User (role) lain ya tambahin boleh, tapi jangan ngide lifeline lain!"

= activity actors as base, allow add Database OR another User-role if flow needs. NO made-up Halaman/Controller/Service/FileStorage.

## Final lifeline plan (all 3 lifelines, strict)
- SD_AUTENTIKASI: User (Pengguna) | Sistem | Database (3) — base AD_LOGIN + DB
- SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK: User (Manajer) | Sistem | Database (3) — base AD_BUAT_PROYEK + DB
- SD_DASHBOARD_EWS: User (Manajer) | Sistem | Database (3) — base AD_KELOLA_DASHBOARD + DB
- SD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE: User (Teknisi) | Sistem | Database (3) — exact AD_UPLOAD_EVIDENCE mirror

## Consolidation rule
Iter 4 had 4-5 lifelines (Halaman, Controller, Service, FileStorage). Iter 5: collapse all middle layers into single `Sistem`. Self-messages on Sistem replace Service/FileStorage internal calls.

## Keep (from iter 4)
- All-rectangle headers
- Linear happy-path (no fragments)
- Academic Indonesian wording from naskah

note: Iteration 5: collapse 4-5 lifelines to 3. Drop Halaman/Controller/Service/FileStorage. Rewrite _gen.py then regenerate.

content:

| SD_PENGELOLAAN_PROYEK.drawio | 7225 |

  - SD_DASHBOARD_EWS: [User (Manajer), Sistem, Database]

note: Bug fix: verticalAlign=bottom -> top in msg_cell() for sync/return/async. Regenerate all 4 .drawio files.

content:
## Diagnosis
verticalAlign=bottom placed labels BELOW arrow line. At y_step=28px, label of msg N (y+8 to y+18) overlapped arrow line of msg N+1 (y+28). draw.io hid overlapping labels silently.

Confirmed bug: SD_AUTENTIKASI msg #3 "meminta data pengguna" (c103, y=206) -- label zone y=207-217 collided with msg #4 arrow at y=234. Only 17px gap, label hidden.

## Fix applied
_gen.py `msg_cell()` lines 44-51: changed `verticalAlign=bottom` -> `verticalAlign=top` in all 3 message types (sync, return, async). Self-messages unchanged (label on loop side, not below arrow).

## Verification results
- All 4 files regenerated (5532/7201/5704/6353 bytes)
- verticalAlign=bottom: 0 matches across all 4 files (PASS)
- verticalAlign=top: 5/8/4/7 per file (message edges confirmed)
- XML parse: PASS all 4
- Spot-check SD_AUTENTIKASI: all 5 directed message arrows = verticalAlign=top. Self-messages = no verticalAlign (correct).
- "meminta data pengguna" label verified top-aligned.
